verse_text: Go to Pharaoh early in the morning, when he goes to the water, and you shall stand by the river's bank to meet him; and you shall take in your hand the rod that turned to a serpent.

pericope.title: The Plague of Water Turned to Blood

links.context: As in the first plague of Egypt ([[EXO.7:14]]-25), the sea, marine life, and maritime commerce are affected.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
